_comment_project_memory: When disabled (default), zero overhead: no file I/O, no pipeline impact.
When enabled, each audit run appends a read-only snapshot to a local JSON
cache under results_dir/.cache/project_memory/. This data is never read
back during a run — it is analytics-only for future tooling.
_comment_adaptive_intelligence: Disabled by default. Reads only the LearningProfile produced by Phase 13.
Produces a deterministic AdaptationReport stored in runtime.metadata only.
No behavioral change, no routing change, no file output in this phase.
Modes: shadow (no output), suggest (report in metadata), prepare_bounded_actions.
min_runs_required: proposals are suppressed until this many runs are recorded.
thresholds: all rate/ratio values are overridable; never self-modified.
_comment_controlled_consumption: Disabled by default. Reads only the AdaptationReport produced by Phase 14.
Produces a deterministic ConsumptionManifest — review-only, never auto-applied.
No behavioral change, no routing change, no scoring change in this phase.
Modes: shadow (no output), generate_manifest (metadata only), review_ready.
allowed_signal_keys: explicit opt-in list — empty means zero actions generated.
allowed_action_types: explicit opt-in list — empty means zero actions generated.
emit_manifest: true writes an isolated JSON under results_dir/.cache/consumption_manifests/.
v1 supports exactly one mapping: calibration_rarely_active -> calibration.enabled = true.
